Module io.github.tonywasher.joceanus.gordianknot
Package io.github.tonywasher.joceanus.gordianknot.api.cipher.spec

Interface GordianStreamKeySubType

All Known Implementing Classes:
GordianStreamKeySubType.GordianBlakeXofKey, GordianStreamKeySubType.GordianChaCha20Key, GordianStreamKeySubType.GordianElephantKey, GordianStreamKeySubType.GordianISAPKey, GordianStreamKeySubType.GordianRomulusKey, GordianStreamKeySubType.GordianSalsa20Key, GordianStreamKeySubType.GordianSkeinXofKey, GordianStreamKeySubType.GordianSparkleKey, GordianStreamKeySubType.GordianVMPCKey
public interface GordianStreamKeySubType
StreamKey SubSpec.
